scripts.release:verify: bun run release:verify:typebuddy && bun run release:verify:simplelog && bun run release:verify:oxlint-plugin-solid
scripts.release:verify:simplelog: bun run --cwd ./packages/simplelog lint && bun run --cwd ./packages/simplelog typecheck && bun run --cwd ./packages/simplelog test && bun run --cwd ./packages/simplelog smoke:oxlint && bun run --cwd ./packages/simplelog build
scripts.release:verify:typebuddy: bun run --cwd ./packages/typebuddy lint && bun run --cwd ./packages/typebuddy typecheck && bun run --cwd ./packages/typebuddy test && bun run --cwd ./packages/typebuddy smoke:globals && bun run --cwd ./packages/typebuddy smoke:oxlint && bun run --cwd ./packages/typebuddy smoke:oxlint:fix && bun run --cwd ./packages/typebuddy smoke:treeshake
scripts.release: bun run release:verify && bun run publish:npm
scripts.release:dry: bun run release:verify && bun run publish:npm:dry
